mapper.select: select menu_id, is_show, menu_grade, menu_icon, menu_name, menu_url, parent_id, sort_id from aoa_sys_menu where menu_name like "%"#{searchName}"%" order by sort_id asc, menu_id asc

select m.menu_id, m.is_show, m.menu_grade, m.menu_icon, m.menu_name, m.menu_url, m.parent_id, m.sort_id from aoa_sys_menu m inner join aoa_role_power_list rp on m.menu_id = rp.menu_id where rp.role_id = #{roleId} and (rp.is_show is null or rp.is_show = 1) and (m.is_show is null or m.is_show = 1) order by m.sort_id asc, m.menu_id asc
